name: Split Content Hero
description: Two-column hero layout with a glass panel on one side and stacked story cards on the other. Ideal for showcasing a product or feature alongside supporting narrative cards.

structure.html:
{{panel_label}}

{{card_1_label}}

{{card_1_title}}

{{card_2_label}}

{{card_2_title}}

{{story_label}}

{{story_title}}

{{story_body}}

story_title.default: The second column should explain, not compete.

story_body.default: Keep support cards calm and let the hero panel do the first impression work.

variants.name: reversed
variants.description: Swap columns so cards appear on the left

variants.name: triple-card
variants.description: Three story cards instead of one
variants.html_diff: Add additional story-card articles to stacked-cards
